examples: With reference to katabatic winds , describe how the stability of the atmosphere is affected by other physical factors.
For blower fan coil, adopting local drop ceiling when they are setting with new wind, but adopting a manner of katabatic wind when they arn't setting with new wind.
I'm writing this blog from Petermann Glacier in northwest Greenland, where a cold katabatic wind is blowing off the ice onto the deck of the Greenpeace ship Arctic Sunrise.
